pr.title: feat: SEO content expansion — 491 pages + 48 resource articles
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds 539 new content files (491 programmatic SEO pages + 48 resource articles) across 15 content categories, plus the infrastructure to load and render them.

**Infrastructure changes:**
- `src/lib/programmatic/types.ts` — Added `body?: string` field and new `PageKind` types (`profession`, `question`, `competitor`, `comparison`)
- `src/content/pages/loader.ts` — New build-time loader that recursively reads hand-written JSON files from `src/content/pages/`
- `src/lib/programmatic/pages.ts` — `buildAll()` now calls `loadHandWrittenPages()` first so hand-written pages take priority over generators
- `src/app/[slug]/page.tsx` — Renders `page.body` via `<Markdown>` component when present, falls back to sections array

**Content pages (491 JSON files):**
| Section | Category | Pages |
|---------|----------|-------|
| 2 | Audience (PGWP, trades, gig, disability, etc.) | 33 |
| 3 | Community (Filipino, South Asian, Somali, etc.) | 25 |
| 4 | Neighbourhood + quadrant (NE, SE, Saddle Ridge, etc.) | 37 |
| 5 | Audience × location cross-products | 51 |
| 6 | Vehicle type × audience | 31 |
| 7 | Vehicle make + model (Toyota, Honda, Ford, etc.) | 86 |
| 8 | Make × credit situation | 42 |
| 9 | Budget ($300/mo, under $20k, zero down, etc.) | 26 |
| 10 | Profession (nurse, electrician, trucker, etc.) | 39 |
| 11 | Calculator (bad credit calc, newcomer calc, etc.) | 19 |
| 12 | Question (how to, can I, what is, etc.) | 52 |
| 13 | Competitor alternatives | 19 |
| 14 | Comparisons (A vs B) | 12 |
| 15 | Seasonal (tax refund, winter tires, etc.) | 6 |
| 16 | Resource articles | 48 |

Every page includes:
- Unique H1, meta title (≤60 chars), meta description (≤160 chars)
- Answer-first intro paragraph
- Calgary-specific markdown body content
- 6 unique FAQs
- Correct lender matching (Rifco/Westlake/NCF/Equitable per audience)
- "6 months covered" differentiator
- Related internal links

**Build note:** The build needs `NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096"` due to the volume of static pages (715 total). You may want to add this to your Vercel build settings.

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] **Spot-check 5-10 pages across different categories** for content quality, lender accuracy, and Calgary-specific relevance — the content is generated from templates so patterns should be consistent but verify the diversity feels genuine
- [ ] **Verify Vercel build succeeds** — may need `NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=4096` in build settings if the default memory limit is insufficient
- [ ] **Check for slug conflicts** with any pages you've added since the branch was created — the loader deduplicates by slug but hand-written pages should win
- [ ] **Review competitor/comparison pages** (Section 13-14) for any claims about competitors that could be problematic
- [ ] **Test a few pages on mobile** to verify the Markdown body renders well in PageShell on small screens

### Notes

- The generator script (`scripts/generate-pages.mjs`) is included so you can regenerate or modify pages. Run `node scripts/generate-pages.mjs` from the repo root.
- Resource articles at `src/content/resources/generated/` use the existing `GeneratedResourceFile` format and are loaded by the existing generated resource loader.
- Some resource slugs overlap with hand-written articles (e.g., `new-vs-used-car-calgary`). The dedup in `articles.tsx` ensures hand-written versions take priority.
- Content body uses templates with Calgary-specific variables. For truly hand-written unique content on high-value pages, you may want to iterate on the templates in the generator script.

Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/7f8b709c417b4f66acd6abdf2be581cc
Requested by: @hammadb2
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
